*�����������������XThis example shows how the using the phaser attribute in the math mix we can convert the phase into rotation values for more complex animations.

As well the ramp TOP is used to generate differnt transition patterns. As long as the transition patterns are switched when the phase fraction parameter is at 0 the animation transition is seemless.

*�����������������XThis example shows how the using the phaser attribute in the math mix we can convert the phase into rotation values for more complex animations.

As well the ramp TOP is used to generate differnt transition patterns. As long as the transition patterns are switched when the phase fraction parameter is at 0 the animation transition is seemless.
